---
title: "Visualization for DE analysis"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(conflicted)
library(tidyr)
conflict_prefer("select", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("rename", "dplyr")
conflict_prefer("count", "dplyr")

all_results <- bind_rows(
  readRDS("bgee_gtex_combined_model_results.rds"),
  readRDS("results_mouse.rds"),
  readRDS("results_pig.rds"),
)

dir.create("results/figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# DEGs by variable
all_results %>%
  filter(padj < 0.05) %>%
  count(species, organ, variable) %>%
  arrange(variable, desc(n))

# side DEGS
side_degs <- all_results %>%
  filter(variable == "side", padj < 0.05)

# signal and directional bias
side_degs %>%
     group_by(species, organ) %>%
     summarise(
         n = n(),
         median_abs_lfc = median(abs(log2FoldChange)),
         pct_up = mean(log2FoldChange > 0) * 100
     ) %>%
     arrange(desc(n))
```

```{r LFC distribution_barplot}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(forcats)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)

theme_pres <- function(base_size = 13) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey93"),
      plot.title    = element_text(face = "bold", size = base_size + 3, margin = margin(b = 4)),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "grey45", size = base_size - 1, margin = margin(b = 10)),
      axis.text     = element_text(color = "grey20"),
      axis.title    = element_text(color = "grey30", size = base_size - 1),
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.text   = element_text(size = base_size - 1),
      plot.margin   = margin(15, 20, 15, 15),
      plot.caption  = element_text(color = "grey60", size = 9, hjust = 0)
    )
}

PAL <- list(
  alt     = "#4D4D4D", 
  primary = "#4D4D4D" 
)

p1_data <- side_degs %>%
  mutate(
    organ_short = case_when(
      organ == "Adrenal Gland Cortex" ~ "Adrenal\nCortex",
      organ == "Adrenal Gland Whole"  ~ "Adrenal\nWhole",
      organ == "Adipose Tissue"       ~ "Adipose",
      organ == "Blood Vessel"         ~ "Blood\nVessel",
      organ == "heart ventricle" & species == "Mus_musculus" ~ "Heart\nVentricle (Mouse)",
      organ == "heart ventricle" & species == "Sus_scrofa"   ~ "Heart\nVentricle (Pig)",
      TRUE ~ organ
    )
  ) 

p1 <- p1_data %>%
  mutate(
    organ_short = fct_reorder(organ_short, abs(log2FoldChange), median),
    organ_short = fct_relevel(organ_short,
      "Heart\nVentricle (Mouse)",
      "Heart\nVentricle (Pig)",
      after = 0
    )
  ) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = organ_short, y = log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = PAL$primary, outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, size = 0.9, alpha = 0.35, color = PAL$primary) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(-5, 5), linetype = "dashed",
             color = PAL$alt, linewidth = 0.5) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "log2 Fold Change (R vs L)") +
  theme_pres()

ggsave("DEG_dist.pdf", p1, path = "results/figures", width = 10, height = 6)
```


```{r LFC distribution_cleveland}
org_order <- c("Heart\nVentricle (Mouse)", "Heart\nVentricle (Pig)",
              "Adrenal\nCortex", "Adrenal\nWhole", "Blood\nVessel",
              "Thyroid", "Muscle", "Skin", "Adipose",
              "Nerve", "Testis", "Ovary")

cleveland_data <- p1_data %>%
  group_by(organ_short) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    median_lfc = median(log2FoldChange),
    q25 = quantile(log2FoldChange, 0.25),
    q75 = quantile(log2FoldChange, 0.75),
    p05 = quantile(log2FoldChange, 0.05),
    p95 = quantile(log2FoldChange, 0.95),
    max_lfc = max(log2FoldChange),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    organ_short = factor(organ_short, levels = org_order),
    y_label = paste0(organ_short, "\n(n=", n, ")")
  )

label_order <- cleveland_data %>%
  arrange(match(organ_short, org_order)) %>%
  pull(y_label)

cleveland_data <- cleveland_data %>%
  mutate(y_label = factor(y_label, levels = label_order))

# Legend
legend_y <- 1.5
legend_data <- tibble(
  y = legend_y,
  x_median = 7,
  x_max = 8.5,
  q25 = 5.5, q75 = 8,
  p05 = 4.5, p95 = 9
)

p_cleveland <- ggplot(cleveland_data, aes(y = y_label)) +
  # 90% range
  geom_segment(aes(x = p05, xend = p95, yend = y_label),
               color = "grey75", linewidth = 1) +
  # IQR
  geom_segment(aes(x = q25, xend = q75, yend = y_label),
               color = "grey45", linewidth = 3) +
  # Median
  geom_point(aes(x = median_lfc), color = "slategray", size = 4) +
  # Max
  geom_point(aes(x = max_lfc), color = "slategray3", shape = 17, size = 3) +
  # Zero line
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey60") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6, 14)) +

  # Legend box 
  annotate("rect", xmin = 10.2, xmax = 14.5, ymin = 0, ymax = 2.8,
           fill = "white", color = "grey70", linewidth = 0.3) +
  # 90% range
  annotate("segment", x = 10.5, xend = 11.5, y = 2.4, yend = 2.4,
           color = "grey75", linewidth = 0.8) +
  annotate("text", x = 11.8, y = 2.4, label = "90% range",
           hjust = 0, size = 2.5, color = "grey30") +
  # 50% range
  annotate("segment", x = 10.7, xend = 11.3, y = 1.8, yend = 1.8,
           color = "grey45", linewidth = 2.5) +
  annotate("text", x = 11.8, y = 1.8, label = "50% range",
           hjust = 0, size = 2.5, color = "grey30") +
  # median
  annotate("point", x = 11, y = 1.2, color = "slategray", size = 3) +
  annotate("text", x = 11.8, y = 1.2, label = "median",
           hjust = 0, size = 2.5, color = "grey30") +
  # max
  annotate("point", x = 11, y = 0.6, color = "slategray3", shape = 17, size = 2.5) +
  annotate("text", x = 11.8, y = 0.6, label = "max",
           hjust = 0, size = 2.5, color = "grey30") +
  
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6, 15)) +
  labs(x = "log2 Fold Change (R vs L)", y = NULL) +
  theme_pres() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

ggsave("DEG_cleveland.pdf", p_cleveland, path = "results/figures",
       width = 10, height = 6)
```

```{r binomial test}
binom_results <- side_degs %>%
  filter(organ != "heart ventricle") %>%
  mutate(
    label = case_when(
      organ == "Adrenal Gland Cortex" ~ "Adrenal Cortex",
      organ == "Adrenal Gland Whole"  ~ "Adrenal Whole",
      organ == "Adipose Tissue"       ~ "Adipose",
      organ == "Blood Vessel"         ~ "Blood Vessel",
      TRUE ~ organ
    )
  ) %>%
  group_by(label) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total = n(),
    n_right = sum(log2FoldChange > 0),
    binom_p = binom.test(n_right, n_total, p = 0.5)$p.value,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    binom_padj = p.adjust(binom_p, method = "BH"),
    padj_label = case_when(
      binom_padj < 0.001 ~ formatC(binom_padj, format = "e", digits = 1),
      TRUE ~ paste0("p=", round(binom_padj, 3))
    )
  )

div_data <- side_degs %>%
  filter(organ != "heart ventricle") %>%
  mutate(
    organ_short = case_when(
      organ == "Adrenal Gland Cortex" ~ "Adrenal Cortex",
      organ == "Adrenal Gland Whole"  ~ "Adrenal Whole",
      organ == "Adipose Tissue"       ~ "Adipose",
      organ == "Blood Vessel"         ~ "Blood Vessel",
      TRUE ~ organ
    ),
    label = organ_short,
    direction = ifelse(log2FoldChange > 0, "Right", "Left")
  ) %>%
  count(label, direction) %>%
  mutate(n_plot = ifelse(direction == "Left", -n, n)) %>%
  left_join(binom_results %>% select(label, padj_label, binom_padj), by = "label") %>%
  mutate(
    text_label = case_when(
      direction == "Left" ~ as.character(n),
      direction == "Right" & binom_padj < 0.05 ~ paste0(n, " (",padj_label, ")"),
      TRUE ~ as.character(n)
    )
  )

label_order <- div_data %>%
  group_by(label) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(n)) %>%
  arrange(total) %>%
  pull(label)

div_data <- div_data %>%
  mutate(label = factor(label, levels = label_order))

p_div <- ggplot(div_data, aes(x = n_plot, y = label, fill = direction)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = text_label),
            hjust = ifelse(div_data$direction == "Left", 1.2, -0.2),
            size = 3, color = "grey20") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey30", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Left" = "#F4A582", "Right" = "#92C5DE"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) abs(x),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.5)) +
  labs(x = "Number of DEGs", y = NULL) +
  theme_pres() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.6, "cm")
  )

ggsave("DEG_diverging_bar.pdf", p_div, path = "results/figures",
       width = 12, height = 5)
```

```{r sign permutation test}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

set.seed(42)
n_perm <- 10000

# Data prep
perm_input <- side_degs %>%
  filter(organ != "heart ventricle") %>%
  mutate(
    organ_short = case_when(
      organ == "Adrenal Gland Cortex" ~ "Adrenal Cortex",
      organ == "Adrenal Gland Whole"  ~ "Adrenal Whole",
      organ == "Adipose Tissue"       ~ "Adipose",
      organ == "Blood Vessel"         ~ "Blood Vessel",
      TRUE ~ organ
    )
  )

perm_results <- perm_input %>%
  group_by(organ_short) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total     = n(),
    n_right_obs = sum(log2FoldChange > 0),
    n_left_obs  = sum(log2FoldChange <= 0),
    pct_right_obs = n_right_obs / n_total * 100,
    perm_p = {
      lfc <- log2FoldChange
      obs_right <- sum(lfc > 0)
      n <- length(lfc)
      # Count how often a random sign-flip produces as extreme a skew
      n_extreme <- sum(
        replicate(n_perm, {
          flipped <- lfc * sample(c(-1, 1), n, replace = TRUE)
          perm_right <- sum(flipped > 0)
          abs(perm_right - n / 2) >= abs(obs_right - n / 2)
        })
      )
      n_extreme / n_perm
    },
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# p-value formatting
perm_results <- perm_results %>%
  mutate(
    perm_p = pmax(perm_p, 1/n_perm),
    perm_padj = p.adjust(perm_p, method = "BH"),
    padj_label = case_when(
      perm_padj < 1e-4 ~ paste0("p<", formatC(1/n_perm, format = "e", digits = 0)),
      perm_padj < 0.001 ~ formatC(perm_padj, format = "e", digits = 1),
      TRUE ~ paste0("p=", round(perm_padj, 3))
    ),
    sig = perm_padj < 0.05
  )

bar_data <- perm_results %>%
  select(organ_short, n_left_obs, n_right_obs, perm_padj, padj_label, sig) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(n_left_obs, n_right_obs),
               names_to = "direction", values_to = "count") %>%
  mutate(
    direction = ifelse(direction == "n_right_obs", "Right", "Left"),
    direction = factor(direction, levels = c("Right", "Left")),
    organ_short = reorder(organ_short, -count)
  )

organ_levels <- levels(bar_data$organ_short)

sig_labels <- perm_results %>%
  filter(sig) %>%
  mutate(
    max_count = pmax(n_left_obs, n_right_obs),
    organ_short = factor(organ_short, levels = organ_levels)
  )

p_perm <- ggplot(bar_data, aes(x = organ_short, y = count, fill = direction)) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6) +
  # horizontal bar connecting left and right
  geom_segment(
    data = sig_labels,
    aes(x = as.numeric(organ_short) - 0.18,
        xend = as.numeric(organ_short) + 0.18,
          y = max_count + 40, yend = max_count + 40),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey30"
  ) +
  # left tick
  geom_segment(
    data = sig_labels,
    aes(x = as.numeric(organ_short) - 0.18,
        xend = as.numeric(organ_short) - 0.18,
          y = max_count + 40, yend = max_count + 25),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey30"
  ) +
  # right tick
  geom_segment(
    data = sig_labels,
    aes(x = as.numeric(organ_short) + 0.18,
        xend = as.numeric(organ_short) + 0.18,
          y = max_count + 40, yend = max_count + 25),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.4, color = "grey30"
  ) +
  # P-value label
  geom_text(
    data = sig_labels,
    aes(x = as.numeric(organ_short), y = max_count + 55,
        label = padj_label),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 2.8, color = "grey30"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("Left" = "white", "Right" = "grey60"),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7), width = 0.6,
           color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Number of DEGs") +
  theme_pres() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.6, "cm")
  )

ggsave("DEG_permutation_bar.pdf", p_perm, path = "results/figures",
       width = 10, height = 6)
```

```{r}
library(diptest)

dist_data <- side_degs %>%
  filter(organ %in% c("Nerve", "Blood Vessel", "Ovary", "Muscle", "Skin")) %>%
  mutate(
    organ_short = case_when(
      organ == "Blood Vessel" ~ "Blood Vessel",
      TRUE ~ organ
    )
  )

# Summary stats and dip test per organ
organ_stats <- dist_data %>%
  group_by(organ_short) %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    mean_lfc = mean(log2FoldChange),
    dip_stat = dip.test(log2FoldChange)$statistic,
    dip_p = dip.test(log2FoldChange)$p.value,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    dip_label = ifelse(dip_p < 0.001,
                       paste0("(dip p=", formatC(dip_p, format = "e", digits = 1), ")"),
                       paste0("(dip p=", round(dip_p, 3), ")"))
  )

p_dist <- ggplot(dist_data, aes(x = log2FoldChange)) +
  geom_density(fill = "grey80", color = "grey40", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
  geom_vline(data = organ_stats, aes(xintercept = mean_lfc),
             color = "black", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_text(data = organ_stats,
            aes(x = mean_lfc, y = Inf,
                label = paste0("mean=", round(mean_lfc, 2))),
            vjust = 2, hjust = -0.1, size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  geom_text(data = organ_stats,
            aes(x = Inf, y = Inf, label = dip_label),
            vjust = 2, hjust = 2.0, size = 2.5, color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~organ_short, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  labs(x = "log2 Fold Change (R vs L)", y = "Density") +
  theme_pres() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),
    panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines")
  )

ggsave("DEG_LFC_distributions_filt.pdf", p_dist, path = "results/figures",
       width = 12, height = 8)

organ_stats %>% as.data.frame()
```
